name: Use of Weak Hash
description: The product uses a hashing algorithm that does not meet security standards, allowing attackers to recover original inputs through preimage attacks, find collisions, or conduct birthday attacks against the hash output.
detection_pattern: INGRESS or STORAGE node feeds data into a TRANSFORM node using a weak hash algorithm (MD5, SHA-1) without a CONTROL node enforcing use of strong adaptive hashing (bcrypt, scrypt, PBKDF2, Argon2)
